expectations.text: Output contains a Mermaid diagram block (```mermaid)
expectations.evidence: networking.md satır 16: ```mermaid bloğu var, graph TB ile Proxmox host, vmbr1, vmbr2, Web/App/DB VM'leri gösteriliyor

expectations.text: Output defines at least 3 distinct networks or bridges (DMZ/web, app, DB)
expectations.evidence: vmbr0 (WAN), vmbr1 DMZ 10.10.1.0/24, vmbr2 Internal 10.10.2.0/24 — 3 ayrı bridge tanımlı

expectations.text: Output explicitly states DB is accessible only from app subnet (iptables DROP or similar)
expectations.evidence: Traffic Policy tablosunda 'App VM → DB VM 5432 ALLOW', 'DMZ → Internal DROP', 'Internet → DB DROP' açıkça belirtilmiş. iptables kuralında sadece 10.10.2.10→10.10.2.20:5432 ACCEPT, DB'nin internete çıkması DROP

expectations.text: Output includes iptables FORWARD chain rules
expectations.evidence: netarch-setup.sh içinde iptables -A FORWARD kuralları mevcut: ESTABLISHED, Web→App, App→DB, MASQUERADE yönlendirmeleri, default DROP

expectations.text: Output includes a subnet/network table with CIDR notation
networking.md file was actually written to outputs directory
